objects.name: Critical Fortinet vulnerabilities fixed in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator
objects.description: Fortinet patched critical flaws in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator that could let attackers remotely execute code on unpatched systems. The flaws could allow attackers to execute arbitrary commands or code on unpatched systems. The first vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-44277, is an improper access control issue in FortiAuthenticator.

external_references.description: Critical Fortinet vulnerabilities fixed in FortiSandbox and FortiAuthenticator
